## Source Basis

map, a public diagram, or a conservative approximation from written sources.

## Public Sources

## Safety Check

- [ ] The source is public.
- [ ] The geometry is civic/contextual, not operationally sensitive.
- [ ] This issue does not include restricted utility maps, access instructions,
      gate details, security details, or operational vulnerabilities.
